---
title: "Working with Quarto"
subtitle: "Week 1"
description: "Monday April 14^th^, 2026"
---



## {{< fa person-chalkboard title="a person pointing at a chalkboard" >}} Lecture Materials {#lecture-materials}

| Lecture slides | Materials | Reading |
|----------------|------------------|------------------|
| [Lecture 1.1: topic Intro](lecture-slides/lecture1.intro-slides.qmd){target="_blank"}   |<a href="../downloadables/Quarto/hello.qmd" download>Download hello.qmd</a>| [Communications of the ACM](../downloadables/Papers/AIinComputingEducation.pdf) <br> [Practical overview/perspective](../downloadables/Papers/perspective_ai_coding.pdf) <br> [Recent review on potential harmful consequences](../downloadables/Papers/AIharmcodingedu.pdf) |
| [Lecture 1.2: topic Quarto](lecture-slides/lecture1.quarto-slides.qmd){target="_blank"} |<a href="../downloadables/week1/p301.csv" download>Download p301.csv</a> | |

## {{< fa pencil title="pencil" >}} Assignments {#assignment-reminders}

| Assignment Type | Assignment Title                              | Date Assigned  | Date Due                   |
|-----------------|-----------------------------------------------|----------------|----------------------------|
| HW              | [Homework Assignment #1](assignments/HW1.qmd) | 16/4/2026      | 20/4/2026 , 11:59pm PT     |
: {.hover .bordered tbl-colwidths="[20,30,20,30]"}
